case_title: H. DRAKE CORP. vs. MORRILL, ROBERT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRILL, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL ST, #717, S.F. CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-12-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY 10/12/93,PLTF. WILL VACATE THIS JUDGMENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
